// THE ORIGIN STORY

The Human Behind The Machine

"Yes, There's An Actual Person Here. Surprising, I Know."

Meet Gaurav Singh Bisht — a data scientist who arrived at AI the scenic route: through finance, numbers, and a burning curiosity for why systems behave the way they do. Born in the mountains of Uttarakhand, raised on spreadsheets and stubbornness, Gaurav is currently pursuing his MBA in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science at Graphic Era University — with a CGPA of 8.7 because apparently being passionate about machines doesn't mean you neglect your GPA.

Right now, he's in full-on mad scientist mode: architecting end-to-end data pipelines on Databricks and AWS, training ML models that actually do useful things, and exploring the frontier of Generative AI and agentic workflows. His MBA isn't just a degree — it's a launchpad for building AI systems that create real-world impact at the intersection of business intelligence and machine intelligence.

The mission? Bold, and he'll say it out loud: to become one of the top AI & Data Engineering minds in India within the next 5 years — building intelligent systems that don't just crunch data, but transform how decisions are made in finance, healthcare, and enterprise. If that sounds ambitious, that's because it absolutely is. And he's completely fine with that.

// WHERE THE MAGIC HAPPENED

The Career Chronicles

"Places That Trusted Me With Real Data. They Survived."

Data Analyst
Anaptyss — Financial Services
📅 Aug 2024 – Jul 2025 · Gurugram, India
"Survived the world of AML/KYC compliance analytics — and came out with dashboards, pipelines, and significantly stronger coffee preferences."
  • Boosted AML risk detection accuracy by 25% by analyzing customer transaction patterns using SQL, Power BI, and Advanced Excel.
  • Automated compliance reporting workflows using Generative AI tools, reducing manual effort by 20% and ensuring 100% audit readiness.
  • Achieved 100% KYC/AML compliance for M&T Bank by delivering data-driven insights to senior stakeholders and coordinating cross-functional teams.
SQLPower BIAML/KYCExcelGenerative AIM&T Bank
Business Development Manager
AIESEC Dehradun — UN SDG Partner · World's Largest Youth NGO
📅 Aug 2025 – Present · Dehradun, India
"Turns out, managing humans is way harder than managing data. But I'm getting there, one partnership at a time."
  • Spearheaded business development for AIESEC's World's Largest Lesson (UN & UNICEF-backed), raising INR 1 Lakh in sponsorships and securing brand partnerships.
  • Led cross-functional teams, driving stakeholder negotiations and delivering SDG awareness to 500+ students.
  • Developed outreach strategies combining digital marketing with community engagement for maximum impact.
LeadershipBusiness DevSDGFundraisingUN/UNICEF
Student Financial Advisor / Campus Ambassador
SFA — Student Financial Alliance
📅 2023 – 2024 · Dehradun, India
"Teaching fellow students about financial literacy — because apparently 'just invest' isn't sufficient financial advice."
  • Advised and educated students on personal finance, investments, and financial planning strategies.
  • Conducted awareness sessions on stock markets, SIPs, and wealth management fundamentals for campus community.
  • Bridged the gap between academic finance theory and practical real-world financial decision-making.
